embedding_model.name: all-MiniLM-L6-v2
embedding_model.description: Lightweight sentence embedding model optimized for semantic similarity tasks. Maps sentences to 384-dimensional dense vectors.

fallback.name: character-ngram-hasher
fallback.description: Deterministic character-level hashing for demo environments without GPU or sentence-transformers installed.

vector_database.name: ChromaDB
vector_database.description: Lightweight open-source vector database for local semantic search.
